name: 川藏骑行 · Sichuan-Tibet Highway
subtitle: 29 Days from Chengdu to Lhasa
mood: On the descent from Dongda, the storm hit. Wind, rain, lightning overhead — and I felt only one thing: let's fight. Maybe life is too comfortable. We forget that survival is a game for the strong.

name: 云南骑行 · Yunnan Cycling
subtitle: 4 Days from Dali to Shangri-La
elevation: 3,300m max (哈巴雪山 Haba Snow Mountain)
mood: Three days of rain, soaked to the bone. The mountains don't care how hard you try — weather has no mercy, and no romance either. That's exactly why it's real.

name: 独库公路 · Duku Highway
subtitle: 6 Days Across the Heart of Tianshan
mood: The slopes are always there. Time is on your side. So you climb — unhurried, one pedal at a time — until you're on the other side of the mountain.
